og.title: ROMGrid — ROM icon generator
og.description: Generate icons for your ROMs styled like real console assets. Frame-based, batch export, runs in your browser.
og.tagline: Generate icons for your ROMs styled like real console assets

whatIs.title: What is ROMGrid?
whatIs.intro: ROMGrid turns your images into ROM icons styled like the real hardware — 3DS, NDSi, PSP and more.
whatIs.framesBody: : a template that shapes your icon to match a specific console or style such as UMD disks, cartridges and more, new ones will keep landing.

iconGen.title: Icon generation
iconGen.intro: Everything you need to generate your ROM icons:

items.steamgrid: Scrapping from SteamGridDB (more will come in future updates)
items.borders: Console frames (3DS home menu icons and more upcoming!)
items.batch: Batch export for multiple games at once

community.title: Community frames
community.intro: Soon you'll be able to share and discover frames from the community:

support.title: How can I support this project?
support.intro: There are many ways to contribute:

items.code: Contributing to code or documentation via Pull Requests

support.github: You can access the project on GitHub from the button below.

follow.title: Where can I follow ROMGrid progress?
follow.p1: At this moment the project is in its early stages of development. You can follow the progress on the GitHub repository, but we don't have a dedicated social media account yet.
follow.p2: The first step will be to create a dedicated YouTube channel, where I'll share updates and any interesting topics.
follow.p3: Feel free to make suggestions and stay tuned for updates!

search.title: Step 1: Select game/s
search.description: Search and select the games you want to create assets for
search.idleDescription: Type a game name in the search bar to find matches on SteamGridDB
search.noApiKeyDescription: You need a SteamGridDB API key to search for games. Go to Settings to add one.

icon.title: Step 2: Adjust styles
icon.description: Choose the icon that you want to use for your game
icon.noIconsAvailable: No icons available for this game
icon.nextButtonTooltip: Select one icon for each game to continue

customize.title: Step 3: Customize
customize.description: Adjust your icons to match your favourite style and export them

preview.title: Icon preview
preview.description: This is how your icon will look when exported

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Tweak the icon to find the perfect style

none.title: No frame
none.description: The icon will be exported as-is, without any frame

exportProgress.title: Exporting icons
exportProgress.description: Generating PNG files for your selected games. This may take a moment.
exportProgress.successDescription: {total} icon(s) packaged and downloaded as romgrid-icons.zip.

sgdb.title: SteamGridDB
sgdb.description: Set up your SteamGridDB API Key to enable fetching of game metadata and images from SteamGridDB. You can find your API key inyour SteamGridDB account settings
